nodes.name: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: Frontend contributor guide describing the React 18 SPA architecture, the mandatory src/api/client.ts HTTP layer, AuthContext/RBAC route gating, per-page API endpoint mappings, theme system, auth flow, and build/verification commands.
nodes.languageNotes: Contains Page-to-API and App-Shell-to-API mapping tables that act as the source of truth for endpoint usage.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: Vite HTML entry point that mounts the React app into #root via /src/main.tsx and preloads fonts, favicons, theme color, and the PWA web manifest.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Frontend npm manifest defining Vite dev/build/preview scripts and dependencies (React 18, React Router 6, Quill WYSIWYG editor, qrcode) plus TypeScript and Vite tooling.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the frontend enabling strict mode, ES2021/DOM libs, bundler module resolution, react-jsx transform, and noEmit type-checking over src.
